Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LOS ANGELES COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Los Angeles Community College District's "demurrer to the second amended complaint" is ordered off calendar in the interests of efficiency and justice, as plaintiff has indicated his intent to seek to file a third amended complaint. Further, the College District is reminded of Local Rule 2.7(B), which requires that courtesy copies of all papers be delivered to the court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
